name: Phase 9 Closed portfolio and retrospectives requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Closure checklist and closure workflow domain
evidence: packages/project-core/src/index.ts implements ClosureChecklist, ClosureRequirement, ClosureData, LessonLearned, ProjectClosureReadiness, ProjectClosureDecision, evaluateProjectClosureReadiness, and closeManagedProjectWithClosure.

Closure readiness checks tenant/project mismatch before exposing detailed closure state, validates required closure fields, blocks non-final/non-active projects, includes stage-gate blockers, and detects open required template tasks.

closeManagedProjectWithClosure requires auditEventId, actor, timestamp, correlation id, complete closure data, and only allows overridable blockers when a blockerOverride has a reason and auditEventId. It returns an immutable completed ManagedProject plus auditable closure decision without mutating the source project.

packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts covers missing closure requirements, open required task blocker, successful closure, auditable closure decision, targeted governed override with audit reference, rejection of generic/partial overrides, tenant mismatch, and source-project immutability.
tests: npm test -- packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts exit 1 RED: evaluateProjectClosureReadiness and closeManagedProjectWithClosure were missing before implementation
npm test -- packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts exit 1 RED during review: generic blockerCode-only override incorrectly resolved targeted open_required_task blockers
npm test -- packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts exit 0: 1 file, 5 tests passed
npm test -- packages/project-core packages/workflow-engine packages/retrospectives exit 0: 12 files, 58 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 11 files, 65 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 63 files, 411 tests passed
rows.cleanup: P9-001 is pure deterministic domain logic with no runtime persistence. Source-project immutability is covered by packages/project-core/src/projectClosure.test.ts; API/browser reset/readback cleanup remains blocked for P9-009 E2E-080.
rows.blocker: Domain foundation is implemented, but P9-001 cannot be verified until closure API/UI and executable E2E-080 prove write-flow readback, audit, permissions, reload persistence, and cleanup/reset.

evidence: packages/retrospectives introduces the @kiss-pm/retrospectives bounded context for Phase 9 snapshot/retrospective domain work.

packages/retrospectives/src/index.ts implements ClosedProjectSnapshot, source refs, schedule/resource/KPI summary DTOs, createClosedProjectSnapshot, readClosedProjectSnapshot, and RetrospectiveModelError.

createClosedProjectSnapshot requires a completed project, tenant/project match with ProjectClosureDecision, deterministic snapshot version/capturedAt, source refs for project/process template/closure decision/schedule baseline/KPI evaluations, and deep-cloned snapshot/readback data.

packages/retrospectives/src/closedProjectSnapshot.test.ts proves snapshot capture, source refs, plan/work metrics, stability after mutating source project/template/lesson data, tenant mismatch rejection, and KPI summary runtime validation.
tests: npm test -- packages/retrospectives/src/closedProjectSnapshot.test.ts exit 1 RED: ./index did not exist before implementation
npm test -- packages/retrospectives/src/closedProjectSnapshot.test.ts exit 1 RED during review: invalid KPI summary severity/value were accepted before runtime validation
npm test -- packages/retrospectives/src/closedProjectSnapshot.test.ts exit 0: 1 file, 4 tests passed

npm run test:integration exit 0: 11 files, 65 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 63 files, 411 tests passed

rows.blocker: Snapshot domain foundation is implemented, but P9-002 cannot be verified until closure API/UI, snapshot readback API, deterministic fixtures, and E2E-080/E2E-081 prove snapshot creation/stability, reload persistence, and cleanup/reset.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Snapshot readback, immutability denial, and reset cleanup must be proven before verification.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Trend calculation reset/readback and snapshot-source proof must be added before verification.

evidence: P9-000 creates the phase contract, initial blocked matrix, and verifier support so later implementation rows have a finite exit gate.
